unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At junior high school, I remember doing a school survey.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sur（表面）+ vey（看作way，道路）-> 在道路表面进行实地考察，也就是调查。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I always did my homework carefully to meet his standards.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: stan（看作stand，站立）+ dard（看作hard，努力）-> 站得稳，需要有硬性标准。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 一排; 一列; 一行 (n.)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I remember scoring two goals in a row during a soccer competition.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: r（人）+ ow（哦，我）-> 人们排成一排，哦！

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I remember scoring two goals in a row during a soccer competition.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: in a row vs in a line
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in a row 原意为排成一排，引申为连续发生、连续几次地。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 键盘式电子乐器; 键盘 (n.)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have learned to play the keyboard in music class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: key（键/钥匙）+ board（板）-> 带有许多琴键的板子就是键盘。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Someone liked Mr. Hunt's teaching methods.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: me（我）+ thod（看作thought，想法）-> 我的想法就是解决问题的方法。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He gave really clear instructions during P.E. class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in（在内）+ struct（建造，结构）+ ion（名词后缀）-> 内部进行结构建造的指导，也就是指示。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 加倍; 是……的两倍 (v.); 两倍的 (adj.)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because of her, I put in more effort and my exam scores doubled.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: dou（都）+ ble（看作able，能够）-> 大家都能做两倍，加倍。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Shall we get each of them a card and gift to say thank you?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sh（沙）+ all（所有）-> 沙滩上的所有人都将要出发。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 回首(往事); 回忆; 回顾 (phr.)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Looking back at these past three years I remember many things.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: look back at vs look down at
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: look（看）+ back（向后）+ at（指向）-> 往回看，就是回首往事。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: The many long hours of training, pride of overcoming fear.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: over（越过）+ come（来）-> 走过来并跨越它，就是克服。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 弄得一团糟; 一塌糊涂 (phr.)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Preparing for art festivals and making a great big mess.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: make a mess vs make a guess
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: make（做）+ a + mess（混乱）-> 制造混乱，弄得一团糟。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: And now it's time to graduate, we will leave our lovely school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: grad（步，级）+ u + ate（动词后缀）-> 跨出人生的一个新台阶，也就是毕业。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't believe it's been three years, I'm trying to keep my cool.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: keep one's cool vs keep one's word
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: keep（保持）+ cool（冷静）-> 保持冷静，沉住气。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 体贴人的; 关心他人的 (adj.)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'll miss the school trees and flowers and our kind and caring teachers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: care（关心）+ ing（形容词后缀）-> 充满关心的，体贴人的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Wonderful memories of ours.
unit_vocabulary.syllable_type: 元音字母组合音节 (Vowel Team)
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: our（我们的）+ s -> 我们的东西/回忆。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm looking forward to going to senior high school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: se（色）+ nior（看作near，靠近）-> 颜色很深，说明是资深的、高级的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm looking forward to going to senior high school.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: senior（高级的）+ high（school的简写，中学）-> 高级中学，即高中。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I had problems with pronunciation and reading texts.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: te（特）+ xt（看作next，下一个）-> 特别阅读下一篇课文。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I can't believe how fast the time went by!
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: go（走）+ by（经过）-> 走过去，即（时间）逝去。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This year, with Mr. Trent's help, my English level has been improving.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: le（乐）+ vel（看作well，好）-> 快乐地上升到很好的水平。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: (大学)学位; 度数; 程度 (n.)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I hope to get a business degree and become a manager.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: de（低下）+ gree（看作agree，同意）-> 大家都同意给你颁发这个学位。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I hope to get a business degree and become a manager.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: manage（管理）+ er（人）-> 管理事务的人，也就是经理。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Mrs. Chen believes in all of them and tells them to "go for it".
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: believe（相信）+ in（在...里）-> 相信一个人内心的能力，也就是信任、信赖。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for coming today.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: gentle（温和的）+ man（男人）-> 温和优雅的男人就是绅士、先生。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Thank you for coming today to attend the graduation ceremony.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: graduate（毕业，动词）+ ion（名词后缀）-> 毕业。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Thank you for coming today to attend the graduation ceremony.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ce（策）+ re（热）+ mony（看作money，钱）-> 策划了一场很热闹很花钱的典礼。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: First of all, I'd like to congratulate all the students.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: first of all vs at first
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: first（第一）+ of all（在所有人/事物中）-> 首先。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: First of all, I'd like to congratulate all the students.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: con（共同）+ grat（感激，高兴）+ u + late（做）-> 共同表达高兴之情，也就是祝贺。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You were all so full of energy and thirsty for knowledge.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: thir（看作third，第三次）+ sty（看作stay，停留）-> 停下来第三次喝水，因为口渴。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You were all so full of energy and thirsty for knowledge.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: be thirsty for vs be hungry for
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: thirsty（口渴的）+ for（为了）-> 像口渴需要水一样迫切，也就是渴望。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Never fail to be thankful to the people around you.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: thank（感谢）+ ful（充满...的）-> 充满感激的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Never fail to be thankful to the people around you.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: be thankful to sb. vs thank sb.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: thankful（感激的）+ to（对）-> 对某人充满感激之情。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Lastly, the end of junior high school is the beginning of a new life.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: last（最后的）+ ly（副词后缀）-> 最后。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You have many difficult tasks ahead of you.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ta（他）+ sk（看作ask，询问）-> 询问他今天分到了什么任务。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You have many difficult tasks ahead of you.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: a + head（头）-> 顺着头的方向往前面看。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: You have many difficult tasks ahead of you.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: ahead of vs in front of
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ahead（在前面）+ of -> 在...前面。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: But along with difficulties, there will also be many exciting things.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: along（沿着，一起）+ with（和）-> 和...一起，连同。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Choose wisely and be responsible for your decisions and actions.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: re（重新）+ spons（承诺）+ ible（能...的）-> 能够重新履行承诺的，是有责任心的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Choose wisely and be responsible for your decisions and actions.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: be responsible for vs lead to
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: responsible（负责任的）+ for（为了）-> 对...承担起责任。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 分开; 分离 (v.); 单独的; 分离的 (adj.)
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Although you have to go your separate ways now...
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: se（分开）+ par（看作part，部分）+ ate（动词后缀）-> 把它们分成不同的部分，也就是分开。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: As you set out on your new journey, you shouldn't forget where you came from.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: set（放置，准备）+ out（向外）-> 整理好装备朝外走，也就是出发。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It is always hard to separate from those whom you have spent so much time with.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: separate（分开）+ from（从...）-> 和某人或某物分离开。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She tells us that knowledge will give us wings to fly.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: w（万物）+ ing（正在进行）-> 鸟儿煽动翅膀，万物正在飞翔。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I always did my homework carefully to meet Mr. Brown's standards.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: meet the standards vs meet the requirement
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: meet（达到，满足）+ standards（标准）-> 达到标准。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: At junior high school, I remember being a volunteer.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: vol（意志，自愿）+ un + teer（人）-> 自愿提供服务的人，也就是志愿者。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He told me to take a break from running.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: take a break vs take a breath
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: take（拿，取）+ a + break（中止，暂停）-> 抽取一段时间进行暂停，也就是休息一下。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I know that Ms. Lee was always patient with you in math class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: pa（怕）+ tient（看作tent，帐篷）-> 在帐篷里躲风雨的人需要有耐心。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She helped you to work out the answers yourself no matter how difficult they were.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: work（工作，劳动）+ out（出来）-> 劳动并得出结果，也就是解决、算出。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She helped you to work out the answers yourself no matter how difficult they were.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: no matter how vs no matter what
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: no（不）+ matter（有关系）+ how（多么）-> 无论多么...都不要紧。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Yes, and Mr. Brown guided me to do a lot better in science.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: gu（鼓）+ ide（看作idea，想法）-> 鼓励你有新想法，指导你前行。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He always took the time to explain things to me clearly whenever I couldn't understand anything.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: when（什么时候）+ ever（无论）-> 无论什么时候，每当。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She encouraged me in English class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: en（使动）+ courage（勇气）-> 使人产生勇气，也就是鼓励。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because of her, I put in more effort and my exam scores doubled.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: put in effort vs make an effort
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: put in（投入，注入）+ effort（努力）-> 投入精力，付出努力。
